name: blinder
description: Blinder - AI-Agent Security & Secret Protection with Plugin Architecture

scripts.test: node --import tsx test/pattern_test.js && node --import tsx test/platform_unit_test.js && node --import tsx test/key_classifier_test.js && node --import tsx test/parser_test.js && node --import tsx test/test_regex.js && node --import tsx test/test_blind.js && node --import tsx test/fix_review_test.js && node --import tsx test/new_patterns_test.js && node --import tsx test/secret_value_test.js
scripts.test:integration: node --import tsx test/platform_integration_test.js && node --import tsx test/objc_migration_test.js
scripts.test:regression: npm run test:regression:ios && npm run test:regression:android && npm run test:regression:flutter && npm run test:regression:node && npm run test:regression:java && npm run test:regression:springboot && npm run test:regression:react
